Our Story

Rooted in Nature,
Backed by Ayurveda

HerbSutra is a natural herbal brand providing pure Ayurvedic products for hair and health. Born from a deep belief in traditional Indian herbal wisdom, we bridge the gap between ancient remedies and modern lifestyles.

We work directly with farmers and trusted suppliers — no middlemen, no shortcuts. Every herb is harvested at its peak, sun-dried naturally, and packed with care to preserve maximum goodness.

"True wellness comes from nature. We're just here to make it accessible for every Indian household."
Shop Our Products →

FAQ

Questions? We Have Answers.

Everything you need to know about our products, usage, and ordering process.

Mix equal parts Amla, Reetha, and Shikakai powder with warm water or curd to form a smooth paste. Apply to scalp and hair, leave for 20–30 minutes, rinse thoroughly. Acts as a complete natural hair wash and deep conditioning treatment. Use 2–3 times per week for best results.
Yes! Our 100% natural powders are free from harsh chemicals, making them safe for all hair types including chemically treated, coloured, and sensitive scalps. Regular use can help repair damage caused by chemical treatments. We recommend a small patch test if you have a very sensitive scalp.
Most customers notice reduced hair fall within 3–4 weeks, and visible improvement in texture, shine, and scalp health within 6–8 weeks of consistent use. Natural remedies create lasting change — unlike quick chemical fixes that damage hair long-term.
Click "Order Now" to fill our simple Google Form with your product selection and delivery details. Our team will contact you within 24 hours to confirm your order and payment. Products dispatched within 1–2 business days, delivered pan-India within 3–6 business days.
Contact us via WhatsApp or email within 48 hours of delivery with clear photos. We will promptly arrange a replacement or full refund. Customer satisfaction is our top priority — every complaint is addressed with care.
